parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id AS asset_id,
  a.asset_type,
  a.template_name,
  (a.avatars->0->>'avatar_id') AS avatar_id,
  a.background_id,
  a.planned_outputs AS placements,
  a.script_text,
  a.phonetic_script,
  a.music_id,
  a.processed_items AS asset_processed_items,
  wp.client_id,
  wp.theme_name,
  wp.status AS plan_status,
  c.name AS client_name,
  c.slug AS client_slug,
  s.cloudinary_url AS music_url,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'vin', iv.vin,
      'item_id', ii.id,
      'title', ii.title,
      'image_url', ii.hero_image_url,
      'price', ii.price,
      'year', iv.year,
      'make', iv.make,
      'model', iv.model,
      'trim', iv.trim,
      'body_style', iv.body_style,
      'mileage', iv.mileage,
      'drivetrain', iv.drivetrain,
      'transmission', iv.transmission,
      'engine', iv.engine,
      'exterior_color', iv.exterior_color,
      'days_on_lot', COALESCE(iv.days_on_lot, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - ii.first_seen_at)::int),
      'sort_order', t.ord
    ) ORDER BY t.ord)
    FROM jsonb_array_elements(a.inventory_items) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(elem, ord)
    JOIN inventory_items ii ON ii.id = (t.elem->>'id')::uuid
    LEFT JOIN inventory_vehicles iv ON iv.item_id = ii.id
    ), '[]'::json
  ) AS vehicles
FROM assets a
JOIN weekly_plans wp ON a.plan_id = wp.id
JOIN clients c ON wp.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN songs s ON a.music_id::text = s.id::text
WHERE a.plan_id = '{{ $json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid
  AND a.included = true
  AND a.template_name IN ('Multi Item', 'Single Item Spotlight', 'Educational')

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: false, message: 'No video assets found for this plan' } }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id AS asset_id,
  a.asset_type,
  a.template_name,
  (a.avatars->0->>'avatar_id') AS avatar_id,
  a.background_id,
  a.planned_outputs AS placements,
  a.script_text,

  a.music_id,
  a.processed_items AS asset_processed_items,
  wp.client_id,
  wp.theme_name,
  wp.status AS plan_status,
  c.name AS client_name,
  c.slug AS client_slug,
  s.cloudinary_url AS music_url,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'vin', iv.vin,
      'item_id', ii.id,
      'title', ii.title,
      'image_url', ii.hero_image_url,
      'price', ii.price,
      'year', iv.year,
      'make', iv.make,
      'model', iv.model,
      'trim', iv.trim,
      'body_style', iv.body_style,
      'mileage', iv.mileage,
      'drivetrain', iv.drivetrain,
      'transmission', iv.transmission,
      'engine', iv.engine,
      'exterior_color', iv.exterior_color,
      'days_on_lot', COALESCE(iv.days_on_lot, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - ii.first_seen_at)::int),
      'sort_order', t.ord
    ) ORDER BY t.ord)
    FROM jsonb_array_elements(a.inventory_items) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(elem, ord)
    JOIN inventory_items ii ON ii.id = (t.elem->>'id')::uuid
    LEFT JOIN inventory_vehicles iv ON iv.item_id = ii.id
    ), '[]'::json
  ) AS vehicles
FROM assets a
JOIN weekly_plans wp ON a.plan_id = wp.id
JOIN clients c ON wp.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN songs s ON a.music_id::text = s.id::text
WHERE a.plan_id = '{{ $json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid

  AND a.template_name IN ('Multi Item', 'Single Item Spotlight', 'Educational')
